posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Sprout Social Integration for monday.com

With our new app, you can:

Schedule posts
Manage your social accounts
View performance metrics
…and more — all without leaving monday.com.

Embed your Sprout Social account right into your boards, dashboards, and widgets. It’s everything you need, in one place.

Check it out and let us know what you think!
Sprout Social Integration App
